briefdescription.para: Computes eulerian connex components of the phase indicator function "indicatrice" according to the get_phase_continue() property.

detaileddescription.para: This method must be used to compute the input data for supprimer_interfaces.

For each eulerian mesh cell num_compo[i] = -1 for all mesh cells containing phase "get_phase_continue()" num_compo[i] = N with 0 <= N < Nmax, for all other mesh cells. N is a global connex component number. Two adjacent cells (by face) for which indicatrice[i] != get_phase_continue() will have the same N.

parameterdescription.para: output: resized, md_vector setup, filled with -1 <= num_compo[i] < Nmax, and virtual space updated. Valeur de retour: Returns Nmax, global number of connex components found.

briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: Remaillage de l'interface: - amelioration petites et grandes facettes,.
Removes all interfaces contained in eulerian elements marked by the "flags_" array, and updates the "indicatrice" field by putting.

detaileddescription.para: "get_phase_condinue()" in those elements. Virtual lagrangian elements are removed. "flags" must be of size "nb_elem" and must be built with one or more connex components (see calcul_composantes_connexes_eurleriennes). Return value: Integral of the "indicatrice" change (e.g. volume of phase changed, positive or negative)

briefdescription.para: Ecriture de l'objet sur un flot de sortie Methode a surcharger.
Lecture d'un Objet_U sur un flot d'entree Methode a surcharger.
Teste s'il existe deux facettes du maillage qui se coupent (avec test_intersection_facettes_2D/3D).

detaileddescription.para: On ne teste pas tous les couples possibles, seulement les couples de facettes qui coupent un meme element eulerien.

memberdef.argsstring: (int fa70, int fa71, const Maillage_FT_Disc &maillage) const
memberdef.name: test_intersection_facettes_2D

detaileddescription.para: Algorithme B. Mathieu Renvoie 0 si les facettes ne se coupent pas -1 si 1 sommet commun -2 si 2 sommets communs 1 si les facettes se coupent

memberdef.argsstring: (int fa70, int fa71, const Maillage_FT_Disc &maillage) const
memberdef.name: test_intersection_facettes_3D

briefdescription.para: Teste si les facettes fa70 et fa71 se coupent.

detaileddescription.para: Renvoie 0 si elles ne se coupent pas, -1 si elles ont deux sommets communs, -2 si elles ont trois sommets communs, -3 si le test preliminaire est positif et l'autre test non 1 si les facettes se coupent et n'ont aucun sommet commun -4 si les facettes ont un sommet commun. L'algorithme est identique a celui decrit dans http://www.cs.lth.se/home/Tomas_Akenine_Moller/pubs/tritri.pdf "a fast triangle-triangle intersection test (tomas moller)"

briefdescription.para: : class Topologie_Maillage_FT Cette classe implemente les procedures de remaillage des interfaces pour le Front-Tracking :
